t-1.notes: feature: deferred-item routing · Deferred.Target @ internal/phase/phase.go · optional target field routes a deferred item to a phase slug; empty = someday

t-2.notes: feature: deferred-item routing · Validate deferred-target guard @ internal/cmd/validate.go · validate flags a deferred target that names no phase dir or milestone.phases entry

t-3.notes: feature: deferred-item routing · Deferred (dross deferred list/route) @ internal/cmd/deferred.go · lists/filters deferred items across specs (--target/--someday/--routed/--milestone/--json + source+index) and stamps a route target on disk

t-4.notes: feature: deferred-item routing · spec.md §4 routing @ assets/prompts/spec.md · spec routes every deferred idea to a destination and re-surfaces parked ideas as candidate criteria

t-5.notes: feature: deferred-item routing · inbox.md someday triage @ assets/prompts/inbox.md · inbox pulls someday deferred items as a second source and routes them through the shared new-phase/backlog/quick/dismiss funnel
